reported_entities.name: Acer Inc. (宏碁股份有限公司)
reported_entities.claim: 宏碁 refers to Acer, the Taiwanese multinational computer hardware and electronics corporation; official English name is Acer Inc.

reported_entities.name: 宏碁 / Acer
reported_entities.claim: Baidu Baike entry confirms 宏碁 is the Chinese name for Acer, founded 1976 in Taiwan by Stan Shih.

reported_entities.name: 宏碁集团 / Acer Group
reported_entities.claim: Confirms Acer Group as the corporate entity behind 宏碁, corroborating identification.

reported_entities.name: 宏碁官方旗舰店 (Acer Official Store)
reported_entities.claim: Official Acer flagship store on JD.com, further corroborating brand identity resolution.

notes: Ran Salva discovery with extra_keywords=['宏碁'], market=Taiwan, industry=consumer electronics/computer hardware. qualified_count=4, all entities consistently resolved to Acer (confidence ~0.40 each, OMLX embedding fallback warnings ignored per instructions). No WebSearch queries needed — Salva results plus well-established public knowledge (Acer Inc., founded 1976 in Taiwan by Stan Shih, HQ in Xizhi, New Taipei City) were sufficient and mutually corroborating.
